name: Merchant's House
unlockCondition: 7,500,000 ducats total wealth, Merchant Guild connection
calculationsAnalysis: The Merchant's House represents middle-class housing with business capabilities. The construction cost of 1,600,000 ducats reflects the quality construction and business facilities, while the income of 30,000 ducats (1.9% return) represents both residential rent and commercial activities. The maintenance cost of 7,500 ducats (25% of income) creates an appropriate maintenance ratio for this tier, reflecting the more complex structure and higher standards. The residentsCapacity of 7 represents the merchant family with servants. The construction time of 4 days (345600000ms) reflects the more sophisticated construction. This building creates a progression into middle-class housing with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the social organization of Renaissance Venice, where guild membership was essential for commercial activities.
shortDescription: Comfortable residence with dedicated office space for business dealings.
fullDescription: A respectable home for Venice's merchant class, featuring separate areas for business and family life. Typically includes a ground floor counting room or office, a piano nobile (noble floor) for family living, and often additional floors for storage or servants. Represents success in Venice's trading world.
flavorText: Ledgers below, living above—the merchant's house is a perfect balance of commerce and comfort, just as the merchant balances risk and reward.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Best suited to Cannaregio, Castello, or Dorsoduro
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Preferably near commercial area or canal
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases property value of adjacent buildings by 5%

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian merchant's house under construction, three-story structure, substantial stone foundation visible, brick walls partially constructed, wooden scaffolding surrounding building, dignified facade taking shape with arched entryway, workers installing decorative stone window frames, ground floor office area with secure features being built, separate entrance for residential portion, construction materials of higher quality than basic residences, period-appropriate construction techniques, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, sophisticated architectural elements emerging
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian merchant's house, elegant three-story structure, dignified plastered facade in warm ochre with stone trim, Gothic Venetian arched windows on piano nobile (second floor), ground floor with secure office featuring decorative iron window guards, separate entrance for business and family, small private courtyard at rear, terracotta roof with small rooftop terrace, decorative chimney pots, quality wooden shutters, small ornamental balcony on main floor, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, subtle architectural flourishes showing prosperity without ostentation, business sign mounted beside office entrance

soundDesign.ambientSound: Quill scratching on paper, quiet business discussions
soundDesign.activitySounds: Coins counting, document shuffling, door knocking

seasonalEffects.winter: Heated interior visible through windows, elegant winter decorations
seasonalEffects.carnival: Quality decorations, guests in masks entering and leaving
